pageContext.name: Doge
pageContext.description: Wow. Very ukiyo. Much picture.   Sideshow Art Prints presents the Doge Canvas Art Print by artist ukiyomemes, blending Japanese art history with modern meme culture to create a high-end and iconic addition to any art collection.  Ukiyo-e, or pictures of the floating world, is a Japanese art movement from the 17th century that emphasizes beauty and pleasure in life through a variety of subjects from history and folk tales. The style became popular with merchants prosperous enough to indulge in the privilege of decorating their homes with artwork — and now you can do the same, with a modern twist!  Artist ukiyomemes blends the classic art sensibilities with the most popular visual language of the current moment, internet memes. In the Doge Canvas Art Print, a mischievous Shiba Inu sits in a patch of pink flowers, surrounded by its enigmatic inner monologue. Captions above its head translate to, Wow. Very ukiyo. Much picture. Would lick. Shibe art is the most powerful. Can't keep my eyes off. Begonias symbolize dark thoughts, beware, and grrrr. Such wisdom from the curious doge.  Each Doge Fine Art Print is officially licensed by Memes of the Floating World, AKA ukiyomemes, and comes printed on Aurora Natural Canvas, adding depth and texture to the image. The gallery wrapped canvas print also features sawtooth hanging hardware already installed for ease of display, and archival inks ensure the longevity of this beautiful composition in your collection.  Such art. Do want. Elevate your humor to the floating world with the Doge Canvas Art Print by ukiyomemes today!
